name: Research Brief
description: Generates a structured research brief for any topic by combining Google Scholar, Google News, and Google Search results with AI synthesis.
author: Omar Rafiq

name: SerpApi Superapp
description: A SerpApi powered superapp built with the SerpApi Python SDK to showcase multi-engine search workflows in one live interface.
author: SerpApi Team

name: SerpAPI Fact Check
description: Fact-checks news headlines by searching reputable news sources and showing whether the claim has been reported elsewhere.
author: Jay Shah

name: SerpTrail
description: Tracks and monitors SEO efforts with SerpApi-powered rank and search visibility workflows.
author: SerpApi Team

name: Foundry Atlas
description: Helps chip designers discover and compare semiconductor and photonic foundries using search aggregation and an interactive map.
author: Joaquin Matres

name: Creator Lens
description: Analyzes YouTube creator strategy with AI using SerpApi data and DeepSeek.
author: SerpApi Team

name: Trend Spotter Dashboard
description: Shows current Google trends, related news, and interest-over-time views for custom topics in a Streamlit dashboard.
author: Amaury Rodriguez

name: Local LLM Web Search
description: Gives a local LLM real-time web search through SerpApi function calling.
author: SerpApi Team

name: SerpAPI Trending News Digest
description: Command-line digest generator that fetches trending Google News results for a topic and formats titles, sources, dates, and links.
author: Joel Peter

name: SerpApi Research Bot
description: Cross-platform AI research agent that brings SerpApi-powered research into Slack and Linear.
author: SerpApi Team

name: Serapp Warbler
description: Field-guide planner for birders and nature photographers that gathers regional sightings, forum data, and image references.
author: Jorge Salvador Vigueras Perez

name: Competitive Intelligence Agent
description: Builds a competitive intelligence workflow with SerpApi engines, OpenAI, and an optional HubSpot add-on.
author: SerpApi Team

name: Car Search Notification
description: Searches for used cars near a target ZIP code and filters results by budget, mileage, and other buyer criteria.
author: Hyun Barng

name: Pyfood
description: Restaurant finder for PyCon attendees that matches nearby Long Beach restaurants to food preferences and allergy constraints.
author: Kirill Ignatev

name: Solar Market Intelligence
description: Tracks solar and distributed-energy policy news, regulatory activity, and search trends across US states.
author: Jim Fingal

name: PyConUS2026 Search Compare
description: Compares Google and DuckDuckGo results for the same query and highlights overlapping and unique result titles.
author: Pawel Zal

name: VibeTrip
description: Travel planning app that explores flight deals and builds trip plans with flights, hotels, and sightseeing options.
author: Shiva Gaire

name: PyPackage Oracle
description: Recommends Python libraries for plain-English tasks using real search results synthesized into an evidence-backed answer.
author: Everest K C

name: WanderLens
description: Builds destination dashboards with attractions, restaurants, hidden gems, events, and travel videos across multiple SerpApi engines.
author: Jeremy Wang

name: SerpSide
description: Conference companion with a restaurant explorer and a swipe-based product price game for deciding what swag is worth saving.
author: Joseph Osei Yaw Nyarko

name: SEO by Serp
description: Tracks Google ranking positions, AI Overviews, People Also Ask data, volatility alerts, and competitor domain movement.
author: Joseph Osei Yaw Nyarko

name: MCP Chat Bot
description: Chat interface backed by a FastMCP server that sends queries to SerpApi and returns organic results as clickable cards.
author: Joseph Osei Yaw Nyarko

name: Pylon 2026 SerpApi Demo
description: Processes natural-language queries with an LLM, runs SerpApi searches, and parses results for user-facing answers.
author: Israel Brewster

name: Serp Geocode Demo
description: Turns single or uploaded lists of human-readable addresses into latitude and longitude coordinates.
author: Aaron Robinson

name: FamilyOut
description: Helps families discover local events and activities by city, date, category, and kid-friendly filters.
author: Brian Chin

name: PyCon SerpApi Vibe
description: Searches an original project idea and shows related existing work so builders can judge timing and find inspiration.
author: Yixing Fu

name: FIRST Robotics News
description: Serves news articles about FIRST, the K-12 international robotics organization, using Google News results.
author: Hanna Keyerleber

name: PyCon 2026 Knowledge Graph
description: Builds a live PyCon knowledge graph by combining SerpApi engines for Google Search, News, Scholar, YouTube, Local, and Reddit.
author: Carmelo Piccione

name: Flight Search Script
description: Automates recurring flight searches between two places so the builder can monitor good travel deals.
author: Ruben

name: Search Signal Board
description: Turns a topic into prototype ideas, repeated terms, related questions, and source links from Google Search and News results.
author: Katarina Nogradiova

name: PriceScope
description: Compares real-time product prices across stores with cheapest-deal discovery, price charts, and filterable result tables.
author: Carla Marcela Florida Roman

name: SerpApi Raffle Companion
description: Conference companion utility for finding talks, slides, speaker bios, demos, and related resources across the web.
author: Goutham Kalla

name: Layout Paper Generator
description: Finds research papers through Google Scholar and generates downloadable photonic integrated circuit layouts from extracted parameters.
author: Joaquin Matres

name: Travel Currency Trends
description: Tracks currency trend signals for travelers using search-driven discovery.
author: Adilson Torres
